content:
Hello,  Keeper!
There are currently 11 languages in the game for the  Keeper to choose from, but due to the size and resources of the team, we have to use AI translation.

🌹 In view of the imperfections of AI translation, we plan and have begun to optimize the text translation of all languages.

▶ **On March 12, we have updated the optimized version of the English translation in the game. **
The following are the main optimization contents:
（1）Optimize the problem of confusing words when expressing the same meaning in different texts in the same context
 (such as: in the same context, power is used at A and strength is used at B)；
（2）Optimize the words in some texts to make them closer to the meaning expressed by the Chinese text；
（3）Optimize the format of punctuation marks.

▶** Future plans**
（1）For more than ten languages in the game, such as Japanese, German, Korean, etc., we will optimize and launch them in the near future；
（2）From March 17 to March 21, we will update the optimized versions of Indonesian, Thai, and Vietnamese.

**🔥Multi-language localization opinion collection🔥**
（1）Goya will create multiple  "opinion collection posts" in different languages in the 【Translation Feedback]】channel. 
Keepers can provide feedback in the comment area of the post in their own language；
（2）Feedback content includes but is not limited to：bugs, translation errors, difficult to understand expressions, suggestions... 
Keepers can speak freely in the comment area for any language localization-related content, and we will confirm and treat them seriously.

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——
Thank you for your continued support and companionship. 
Because of you, Mythag University has more confidence to move forward ❤️ .

May the Silver Key guide the way ——
@everyone

【遊戲文本多語言本地化意見收集&未來優化計劃】

守密人，你好！
目前遊戲內總共有11種語言供守密人選擇，但受限於團隊規模和資源，我們只好使用AI翻譯。
🌹 針對AI翻譯不完美的地方，我們計劃並已開始對所有語種的文案翻譯進行最佳化。

▶在3月12日，我們已更新遊戲內英文翻譯的最佳化版。以下為主要優化內容：
1、優化在相同語境下，不同文本裡表達同一個語意時用詞混亂的問題（如：在一樣的語境下 A處用power，B處用strength）；
2、優化部分文本內的單字，使之更貼近中文文本所表達的意思；
3、優化標點符號的使用格式。

▶未來計劃◀ 
1、針對日語、德語、韓語……等遊戲內十餘種語言，我們將在近期陸續優化上線；
2.、在3月17日~3月21日期間，我們將更新印尼語、泰語、越南語的最佳化版本。

🔥多語言本地化意見收集🔥
1、戈雅會在【翻譯回饋（translation-feedback)】頻道新建多個不同語種的“意見收集貼”，守密人可在自己所屬語種的帖子評論區下進行反饋；
2、回饋內容包括但不限於：bug、翻譯錯誤、理解困難的表達、建議…守密人有任何語言在地化相關的內容都可以在評論區暢所欲言，我們一定一一確認並嚴謹認真對待。

——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——
感謝守密人一直以來的支持與陪伴，因為你們，彌薩格大學才更有信心走下去❤️ 
願銀鑰指引前路——
@everyone
